data.title: Fix invisible nav links still clickable when closed (opacity-0 but interactive)

data.body: Review: PASS. Toggling pointer-events-auto/pointer-events-none on the left (line 163) and right (line 213) nav containers based on navOpen state is the correct fix. Before: opacity-0 nav links with pointer-events-auto intercepted clicks on underlying content including the wordmark. After: pointer-events-none when closed means events pass through to elements below. pointer-events is not animatable so it switches instantly — this is correct behavior (links should be immediately non-interactive when closing, immediately interactive when opening). Mobile overlay is unaffected (separate system with its own pointer-events handling). Type-check and lint pass.
